title: Amtech T0790 Brass Small Padlocks with Keys for Luggage, lockers, Toolboxes, Cupboards, & Sports Bags, 20mm, 12-Piece
features: DURABLE: These brass padlocks have heavy duty solid brass bodies with 3mm hardened steel shackles
VERSATILE: Each padlock is supplied with 2 keys and they are ideal for securing suitcases, sports bags, luggage, cupboards, lockers, tool boxes, etc (one key fits all locks)
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your Security requirements. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Amtech Brass Padlock Keep your belongings secure with Amtech’s Brass Padlock set – with 12 padlocks that you can use for your bags and luggage. Every padlock has two of its own keys. Suitable for use with suitcases, luggage, toolboxes, cupboards, sports bags, and lockers separately to keep your belongings safe. You can use these padlocks for both indoor and outdoor usages. Suitable for locking suitcases, bags, luggage, toolboxes, and cupboards. Every padlock is 20mm in size. Two keys with every padlock. 12 padlocks Can be used for both indoor and outdoor purposes.
